annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under K.S.A. 16-201 — 10% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Kansas’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
